tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within normal limits except for a mildly decreased fasting glucose (69.1 mg/dL). This isolated mild hypoglycemia may be clinically insignificant if asymptomatic, but correlation with clinical context is advised. No evidence of renal or electrolyte disturbances. Recommend clinical correlation and repeat glucose if symptoms suggest hypoglycemia.

text.div: Provider Organization: Conan Doyle Medical Centre
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
